Network.Description: GEOSCOPE - French Global Network of Seismological Broadband Stations

Operator.Agency: École et observatoire des sciences de la Terre (EOST)

Comment.Value: Error on sensors poles may reach 2 percent.
Occasional data loss due to transmission issues
Frequent data loss due to transmission issues
